meanings.definition: the withdrawal of heat to change something from a liquid to a solid

examples: When he saw the police car he froze
The water in the bowl froze
I could freeze to death in this office when the air conditioning is turned on

meanings.definition: stop a process or a habit by imposing a freeze on it
examples: Suspend the aid to the war-torn country

meanings.definition: be very cold, below the freezing point
change from a liquid to a solid when cold
prohibit the conversion or use of (assets)
examples: Freeze the assets of this hostile government
She froze when she saw her ex-husband
